description: Author a FAILING Core test (SchedulerReviewGateTests, TDD red against current code) that drives the REAL Scheduler wave loop at the review gate for an unreviewed wave: with gateThresholds.review-gate=proceed-unreviewed the wave RUNS and a proceeded-unreviewed decision is recorded; with the default (escalate) the wave HALTS with a review-gate escalation (Option E); neither path writes a review marker (the never-forged floor, §5 floor 3)
